hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$m = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.claude\projects\C--Users-qw840-Desktop-mini-youtube\memory\MEMORY.md'; if (Test-Path $m) { Write-Output '=== 記憶索引 ==='; Get-Content $m }; Write-Output '=== 最近 commits ==='; git log --oneline -5 2>$null"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "$s = git status --short 2>$null; if ($s) { Write-Output ('提醒：工作樹有 ' + ($s | Measure-Object).Count + ' 個未提交變更——確認已驗證、是否需要 commit。') }"
